action_set_definitions.name: get_maintenance_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the onboard maintenance telemetry data for a specific aircraft to identify exceedance details and affected stages.

aircraft_id.description: The registration number of the aircraft (e.g., 'N777GE').

action_set_definitions.name: check_thermal_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks if the engine has met thermal safety requirements for manual or drone-based inspection.

aircraft_id.description: The registration number of the aircraft.

action_set_definitions.name: initialize_3d_measurement
action_set_definitions.description: References and calibrates the 3D Phase Measurement system against a known standard.

system_id.description: The unique identifier for the measurement tool/drone system.

action_set_definitions.name: visual_identify_component
action_set_definitions.description: Identifies the specific component ID and its alloy type within a compressor stage via visual recognition.

stage_id.description: The compressor stage identified from telemetry.

action_set_definitions.name: measure_defect_depth
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a high-accuracy 3D phase measurement to determine the depth of a defect on a specific component.

component_id.description: The unique ID of the component to be measured.

action_set_definitions.name: get_alloy_maintenance_limits
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the airworthiness limit thresholds for a specific stage and alloy type from the manufacturer's manual.

alloy_type.description: The material alloy of the component.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_final_disposition
action_set_definitions.description: Records the final airworthiness decision for the engine in the maintenance log.

aircraft_id.description: The registration number of the aircraft.

disposition.description: The final status determined by the inspection.

inspection_data_summary.description: Summary of measurements and findings leading to this decision.

state_description.aircraft_metadata: General info about the aircraft being inspected.
state_description.agent_location: The current zone or component the inspector/drone is positioned at.
state_description.component_conditions: The ground-truth status of various components (hidden from Agent unless inspected).
state_description.inspection_progress: List of component IDs that have been successfully fully inspected.
state_description.tool_status: Status of the inspection equipment (e.g., drone battery, sensor calibration).

aircraft_metadata.maintenance_summary: N2 vibration spike recorded at 2.8 ips; check telemetry module for localized stage data.
